_comment: Manually maintained run + queue registry. live_dashboard.py rereads this every probe cycle.

runs.what: PEMS03 audit: CrossFormer + TimesNet, 4 horizons x 3 seeds, canonical protocol
runs.progress: Crossformer pred-12 training (1.45s/iter); fixed: python3, reformer_pytorch, --freq m, disk cleanup

runs.what: PEMS04 audit: CrossFormer + TimesNet, 4 horizons x 3 seeds
runs.progress: CrossFormer grid COMPLETE: 0.0679/0.0783/0.1609/0.1310 (published rows 1.3-3.1x inflated). TimesNet grid running.

runs.what: PEMS07 audit: CrossFormer + TimesNet, 4 horizons x 3 seeds, batch 8 (N=883)
runs.progress: CrossFormer pred-12 done: 0.0677 mean, 44% seed spread at N=883

runs.what: PEMS08 audit: CrossFormer + TimesNet, 4 horizons x 3 seeds
runs.progress: CrossFormer 12/24/48 done (0.1368/0.1637/0.1914); pred-96 OOM at batch32, batch-16 fixup staged; TimesNet running

runs.what: StructMamba PEMS04 CLEAN RERUN (replaces dual-instance-tainted grid)
S-Mamba PEMS04, TWO regimes: published config (d1024/e4/lr3e-4, itr3) + canonical (d256/e3/lr1e-3)
runs.progress: COMPLETE: pub 0.0726/0.0843/0.1006/0.1235 (reproduces paper), canonical 0.0770/0.0987/0.1450/0.2240 (premium 6/17/31/81%). StructMamba sweeps same-budget. Blog #5 published. Refill: S-Mamba P07/08 running.

runs.what: iTransformer PUBLISHED config (e4/d512, official repo script) PEMS03 grid + PatchTST pred-24/48/96 gap-fill
runs.progress: ITP sweep COMPLETE: short-horizon reproduces; 5 long-horizon cells DIVERGE from official configs; canonical never diverges.
started via refill.sh after P04; disk-full incident resolved (100%->39%, metrics preserved)

runs.what: SECrossformer PEMS07 extension (12/24) - completing 4-dataset keystone table
Traffic (N=862) Phase-3: SECrossformer + iT + CrossFormer, horizons 96/192/336/720, batch 4
runs.progress: data converted (OT header) + masks (3,862,862); batch reduced 8->4 for 16GB; StructMamba-Traffic runs on 30627 (mamba env)

runs.what: Traffic (N=862) baselines: iTransformer + CrossFormer, horizons 96/192/336/720, batch 4
runs.progress: added 06-14; provisioned torch2.4+deps; co-tenant nice-19 yield to sisa_bench; offloads A4000 GPU1

queue.what: S-Mamba + DMamba self-runs under canonical protocol (verify code availability first)
queue.target_boxes: first box to finish its audit grid

queue.what: Protocol-inflation axis: rerun top-3 methods at their published configs
S-Mamba PEMS03/07/08 grids (both regimes) - run on box 40230626 after PEMS04 finishes (dual-A4000 mamba env blocked: custom cxx11abiFALSE torch defeats all wheels+source builds so far)
ECL (N=321, ready) + Traffic (N=862, prepped) - SECrossformer + StructMamba (+iT/CrossFormer on Traffic), horizons 96/192/336/720
queue.target_boxes: 30627 chained: SEC-P03 -> ECL -> Traffic; will parallelize across freed boxes
